---
title: "GST Collections Forecasting — ARIMA + Shinydashboard"
description: "Monthly GST analysis 2017–2026 with ARIMA seasonal forecasting, ETS models, and a full interactive Shiny dashboard with state-wise breakdowns and downloadable forecasts."
author: "Pawan Jangra"
date: "2024-12-01"
categories: [Fiscal, Shiny, ARIMA, ggplot2]
image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1611974789855-9c2a0a7236a3?w=600&q=80"
---

Full analysis in [Data Visualizations](../data_vizs.html).

**Tools used:** R, forecast, Shiny, shinydashboard, ggiraph, ggplot2

**Data source:** GST Council, Ministry of Finance
